news.t: BlackRock Bolsters Outcome ETF Suite with Nasdaq Premium Income Strategy

holdings.infoBox: BALQ is an equity ETF with a total of 118 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.44%, Apple at 7.50%, Micron Technology at 6.00%, Microsoft at 5.99%, and Amazon.com at 4.75%.

overview.description: The iShares Nasdaq Premium Income Active ETF (BALQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that holds a portfolio of US large-cap companies listed in the Nasdaq stock market. The fund utilizes proprietary return forecast models combined with quantitative analysis methods. BALQ was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Bolsters Outcome ETF Suite with Nasdaq Premium Income Strategy
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock expanded its outcome ETF suite with the launch of the iShares Nasdaq Premium Income Active ETF (Nasdaq:BALQ). BALQ aims to provide current income while capt...
